headline: QUALCOMM (QCOM) Stock Just Lost Its Place In Several Russell Indices
summary: QUALCOMM (NasdaqGS:QCOM) has been removed from multiple Russell growth and value indices. The index changes follow a period of AI related announcements, infrastructure launches, partnerships, acquisitions and new revenue targets. The adjustments affect how the stock is represented in prominent benchmarks that many passive funds track. For investors watching QUALCOMM, the index removals arrive just after a busy stretch of AI focused updates that aim to expand the business beyond its...
